_comment: End-to-end triage fixtures (Task 5). Each case is a NormalizedMessage-shaped fixture file plus the EXPECTED RECOMMENDATION CLASS (action type, not exact wording — per the brief). The replay test (apps/agent-handler/src/e2e-replay.test.ts) loads these files, drives runAgentTurn with a deterministic keyword-based fake model (no Bedrock), and asserts the produced actionType matches expectedActionType and that low-confidence cases land in needs_context. Wording is never asserted — only the class.

cases.note: A direct question from a client expecting an answer.
A newsletter / announcement — informational, no reply owed.
A meeting request needing a scheduling action.
Work that belongs to another team member — hand off.
Urgent, high-stakes — surface to the principal.
Ambiguous / low-signal — the confidence gate must route this to needs_context with no draft.
